creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Good morning,

The port still needs a little work.  You can start by running "portlint -A" from the solver directory and try to silence the errors and warnings it produces.

Then add DEVELOPER=yes to your /etc/make.conf, so you will see stage-qa messages when installing.

These two tools will catch most of the potential problems, but not all.

Thanks for getting involved in ports!
